hero.title: Luminol
hero.tagline: *Built for survival and anarchy servers, bringing optimizations, configurable vanilla mechanics, and a rich API.*

threading.title: Extreme multithreaded performance
threading.desc: Built on Folia’s regionized multithreading architecture, Luminol further optimizes scheduling. Under heavy redstone, dense entities, and large builds, it reduces main-thread pressure and helps servers stay responsive at 20 TPS even at high concurrency.

linear.title: Linear world format built-in
linear.desc: Includes first-class support for the Linear world format. Compared to classic Anvil, Linear can reduce disk usage significantly and improve chunk load/save throughput, addressing IO bottlenecks on large worlds.

stability.title: Deep bug fixes and stability
stability.desc: In addition to upstream Folia fixes, we deliver targeted fixes for community-reported crashes, entity issues, and chunk corruption. The goal is a more stable runtime for production than vanilla Folia.

config.title: Highly configurable gameplay logic
config.desc: Via luminol.yml, you can fine-tune everything from mob spawning and redstone tick behavior to specific vanilla feature toggles. Designed to satisfy both casual survival servers and high-end technical servers.
config.descAfterFile: , you can fine-tune everything from mob spawning and redstone tick behavior to specific vanilla feature toggles. Designed to satisfy both casual survival servers and high-end technical servers.

luminol.desc: A core branch based on Folia, focused on extreme performance and production stability.

lophine.desc: Designed for technical Minecraft servers—restoring legacy behavior and adding more tooling for advanced builds.

lighting.desc: Maximizes legacy plugin compatibility and mitigates Bukkit API breakage in the Folia ecosystem.

api.intro: Luminol provides an extended API to help plugin developers build more safely and efficiently in Folia’s regionized multithreaded environment. You can access region schedulers, handle async flows, and leverage Luminol-specific performance interfaces.

roles.luminolFounder: Founder and core maintainer of Luminol
roles.frontendRefactorCoreContributor: Core contributor to the frontend refactor

download.title: Get started
download.desc: Choose a branch for your server, download the latest build, and experience performance and optimizations.

step3.title: 3. Migration notes
step3.desc: If you are migrating from Paper, note that some plugins that are not compatible with multithreading may not work under the Folia architecture. Validate plugin compatibility in a staging environment first.
